narrative:
Precinct Urbana 2-B (precinct in Champaign County) has 959 registered voters, with 41.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 45.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 33.1 percentage points.
